name: product-costing-saas
description: Product Costing SaaS — deterministic costing engine, editable web UI, AI assistant.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @costing/shared && npm run build -w @costing/api && npm run build -w @costing/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @costing/shared && npm run typecheck -w @costing/api && npm run typecheck -w @costing/web
